title: Best lcd/led tvs | Bin Diving

recommendations.product_name: LG C5 65" OLED evo AI 4K Smart TV (2025)

recommendations.product_name: Samsung S95F 65" OLED 4K Vision AI Smart TV (2025)
pros: Very bright OLED with vivid colors
Strong motion handling and smart TV features
cons: No Dolby Vision support on some Samsung models

recommendations.product_name: Hisense U6 / U65QF 65" Mini-LED ULED 4K (U6/U65QF series)
pros: Outstanding value for brightness and HDR
Good gaming specs for the price (high refresh, low input lag)
cons: Software and UI can be less polished than premium brands
Occasional variability in panel quality for some batches
